Modified: head/sysutils/salt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/salt/Makefile	Wed Aug  1 17:55:17 2012	(r301837)
+++ head/sysutils/salt/Makefile	Wed Aug  1 18:46:29 2012	(r301838)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	salt
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.10.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	https://github.com/downloads/saltstack/salt/
 
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ COMMENT=	Distributed, remote execution a
 
 LICENSE=	AL2
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	zmq.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/zmq
+LIB_DEPENDS=	zmq:${PORTSDIR}/devel/zmq
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pyzmq>=2.1.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-pyzmq \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pycrypto>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pycrypto \
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml
 
 FETCH_ARGS=	-pRr
 USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
 
 USE_RC_SUBR=	salt_master \
 		salt_minion \

Added: head/sysutils/salt/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/salt/files/patch-setup.py	Wed Aug  1 18:46:29 2012	(r301838)
@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+--- work/salt-0.10.2/setup.py.orig	2012-07-16 20:33:03.000000000 -0600
++++ setup.py	2012-07-31 20:53:47.983862084 -0600
+@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@
+ if 'SYSCONFDIR' in os.environ:
+     etc_path = os.environ['SYSCONFDIR']
+ else:
+-    etc_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(PREFIX), 'etc')
++    etc_path = os.path.join('%%PREFIX%%', 'etc')
+ 
+ libraries = ['ws2_32'] if sys.platform == 'win32' else []
+ 
+@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@
+                              'salt.utils',
+                              ],
+                 'package_data': {'salt.modules': ['rh_ip/*.jinja']},
+-                'data_files': [('share/man/man1',
++                'data_files': [('man/man1',
+                                 ['doc/man/salt-master.1',
+                                  'doc/man/salt-key.1',
+                                  'doc/man/salt.1',
+@@ -125,9 +125,8 @@
+                                  'doc/man/salt-run.1',
+                                  'doc/man/salt-minion.1',
+                                  ]),
+-                               ('share/man/man7', ['doc/man/salt.7']),
++                               ('man/man7', ['doc/man/salt.7']),
+                                ],
+-                'install_requires': requirements,
+                 }
+ 
+ if with_setuptools:
